title: scutellaria rupestris
intro: Scutellaria rupestris, commonly known as alpine skullcap, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria rupestris include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
